item.name: Zeh Tortoh
item.description:
Often likened to flower petals, these resplendent fish are sought after by aesthetically minded anglers.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Roughly translated, the Yok Huy name of this wavekin means “fish of never-ending blooms.” A fitting name for a creature bearing such a close resemblance to a delicate petal.
